html: A Broken Shell is an Item dropped by Slurtles, Snurtles, and Slurtle Mounds when killed or destroyed. Broken Shells can be used to craft a Potted Fern.
plainText:
Don't Starve
Together
Broken Shell
10
Dropped by
, ,
"slurtle_shellpieces"
“A puzzle with no solution.”
–Wilson
“Heh. It broke.”
–Willow
“Is broken.”
–Wolfgang
“Pieces of broken slurtle dreams.”
–Wendy
“THEY DON'T FIT BACK TOGETHER”
–WX-78
“Pieces of the broken.”
–Wickerbottom
“I broke his home. I feel bad.”
–Woodie
“They don't fit back together.”
–Maxwell
“Perhaps they can be re-fused somehow.”
–Wagstaff
“They're smashed up gööd.”
–Wigfrid
“We hit it a little too hard.”
–Webber
“Holding on to these doesn't even seem worth it.”
–Walani
“If only I had crazy glue.”
–Warly
“I ain't one fer puzzlers.”
–Woodlegs
“BROKEN HOME O' SLIME BEASTIES”
–Wilba
“Spiky Shell bits”
–Wormwood
“Pfft. Not even good as ammunition.”
–Wheeler
“Broke, but I might salvage something useful.”
–Winona
“Shards of shell I do see here.”
–Wortox
“Aw, it broke!”
–Wurt
“Sorry slurtle.”
–Walter
“A handful of shattered shell bits.”
–Wanda
A Broken Shell is an Item dropped by Slurtles, Snurtles, and Slurtle Mounds when killed or destroyed. Broken Shells can be used to craft a Potted Fern.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vỏ Hỏng là Vật phẩm rơi ra bởi Sên Rùa, Sên Rùa và Gò Sên khi bị giết hoặc phá hủy. Vỏ Vỡ có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Dương Xỉ Trong Chậu.

A '''Broken Shell''' is an [[Items|Item]] dropped by [[Slurtle]]s, [[Snurtle]]s, and [[Slurtle Mound]]s when killed or destroyed. Broken Shells can be used to craft a [[Potted Fern]].
{{clear}}

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Broken Shell
|item2 = Foliage
|count2 = 5
|result = Potted Fern
|Science 2 = yes}}
